title: Residents' Survey 2026 - Share your views with Alan | Alan Mak
h1: Residents' Survey 2026 - Share your views with Alan
meta_description: As your active, visible and community-focused local champion, I engage regularly with residents and attend community events throughout the year.I have met and corresponded with thousands of residents and I am really keen to hear about what matters to you and your family.
headings: h3: Alan Mak Member of Parliament for the Havant Constituency
text_excerpt: Residents' Survey 2026 - Share your views with Alan | Alan Mak Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Alan Residents' Survey News Contact Residents' Survey 2026 - Share your views with Alan Tweet As your active, visible and community-focused local champion, I engage regularly with residents and attend community events throughout the year. I have met and corresponded with thousands of residents and I am really keen to hear about what matters to you and your family. I run regular surveys that help inform my work as your local champion. I have opened a survey in relation to each area of the Havant Constituency. Please click the relevant link below to complete a survey to share your views with me: OurPlan Survey - Spring 2026 Bedhampton residents' survey Emsworth residents' survey Havant/St. Faith's residents' survey (includes Havant town centre, Langstone, Denvilles and Warblington) Hayling Island residents' survey Leigh Park residents' survey Purbrook residents' survey Stakes residents' survey Alan Mak Member of Parliament for the Havant Constituency Footer About RSS Accessibility Cookies Privacy About Alan Mak Alan's E-Mail Newsletter - Sign Up! Media Centre Promoted by Alan Mak of Denvilles House, 33 Emsworth Road, Havant PO9 2SN.
